allow:
Bash(git add backend/gemini_client.py backend/main.py frontend/src/App.tsx frontend/src/components/FormSelector.tsx frontend/src/hooks/useEchoAccess.ts frontend/src/hooks/useVoice.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: resolve 6 bugs blocking form selection and voice input

- FormSelector: remove invalid items={} prop forwarded to DOM
- useEchoAccess: add useRef for selectedForm and answers to fix stale
  closure bugs \(form_name was empty on first question; answered array
  was missing latest answer when sent to Gemini\)
- useVoice: expose clearTranscript\(\) to prevent double-submission of
  stale voice transcripts
- App.tsx: call clearTranscript\(\) before consuming voice.transcript
- gemini_client: replace blocking client.models.generate_content\(\) with
  await client.aio.models.generate_content\(\) to unblock async event loop
- main.py: replace deprecated @app.on_event\("startup"\) with
  asynccontextmanager lifespan pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(grep -i "SUPABASE\\|VITE" /Users/bryan/Documents/hackathons/EchoAccess/EchoAccess/.env | cut -d= -f1 && echo "---" && ls /Users/bryan/Documents/hackathons/EchoAccess/EchoAccess/frontend/.env* 2>/dev/null || echo "no frontend .env")

Bash(cd /Users/bryan/Documents/hackathons/EchoAccess/EchoAccess/backend && source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import jwt
secret = 'JBMKjNGBcor92zPQpEBdQ7GNiMm0s7YOGXvDcRBoTbgP9mNmVwv0a4nanG/zxJvJ1Qv8yGMDyPdFVsfka6Wjww=='
anon = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImNrZG9kemtqenN5c3l5c2pyYnphIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzI4OTcwNDEsImV4cCI6MjA4ODQ3MzA0MX0.eSoDphVKy6x7uJMpEA_DG4u0RVAvWInskqXeGaPd1n8'
try:

except Exception as e:

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "import jwt; from jwt import PyJWKClient; print\('PyJWKClient available'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(pkill -f "uvicorn main:app" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000)

Bash(git add backend/gemini_client.py frontend/src/App.tsx frontend/src/components/ChatPanel.tsx frontend/src/hooks/useEchoAccess.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: voice-first UX overhaul for hands-free form filling

- Voice form selection: app greets user on startup, lists available
  forms via TTS, and listens for voice input to auto-select a form
- Auto-listen: microphone starts automatically after each spoken
  question, creating a fully hands-free speak→listen→answer loop
- Chat auto-scroll: replaced broken ScrollArea query with sentinel
  div + scrollIntoView so chat always follows new messages
- Pre-parse cache: all forms are parsed in the background on load,
  eliminating the "reading form..." delay when a form is selected
- Trimmed Gemini prompt: generate_question prompt reduced ~60% for
  faster API responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd /Users/bryan/Documents/hackathons/EchoAccess/EchoAccess/backend && source venv/bin/activate && pip install httpx -q 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/tts -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"text":"Hello, welcome to EchoAccess!"}')

Bash(git add backend/main.py backend/requirements.txt frontend/src/hooks/useVoice.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: integrate ElevenLabs TTS for natural-sounding voice

- Add /api/tts backend endpoint that proxies text to ElevenLabs API
  and returns audio/mpeg using the eleven_flash_v2_5 model
- Update useVoice speak\(\) to fetch audio from backend and play via
  Audio element, with automatic browser speechSynthesis fallback
- Update cancelSpeech to stop ElevenLabs audio playback
- Add httpx dependency for async HTTP calls to ElevenLabs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
